description: DeBERTa-v3-base with all stability fixes applied. Root cause of setup8/setup9 collapse: positive_class_weight_scale=2.0 default amplifies the raw 70/30 ratio to 4.5x, giving DeBERTa a trivial all-positive optimum it never escapes. Fixes: (1) positive_class_weight_scale=0.5 brings the effective positive weight to ~1.1, removing the collapse incentive; (2) lr=1e-5, below the instability threshold for DeBERTa disentangled attention; (3) optimizer_eps=1e-6 for numerical stability; (4) freeze_embeddings_epochs=1 keeps the embedding layer frozen for epoch 1 so the attention layers stabilize before the embeddings are updated; (5) layerwise_lr_decay=0.9 applies lower LR to early layers; (6) warmup_ratio=0.1 gives a longer ramp before full LR; (7) weight_decay=0.01; (8) max_grad_norm=1.0; (9) validation_file for epoch-level checkpoint selection. Input: query + response, matching setup6/setup12 for a clean backbone comparison.
